What We Do
Comprehensive Plumbing
Solutions
01
🏢

Commercial Plumbing

Full-service commercial plumbing for offices, retail, hospitality, and strata properties. Delivered on time, on budget.

02
📋

Insurance Plumbing

Experienced working directly with insurers and case managers for fast, compliant, and fully documented plumbing repairs.

03
🔍

Preventative Maintenance

Scheduled maintenance programs to identify and address plumbing issues before they become costly problems.

04
🏠

Domestic Plumbing

All general residential plumbing — leaks, blocked drains, hot water, burst pipes, and new installations done right.

05
🏗️

Roof Plumbing

Gutters, downpipes, flashing, and roof leak detection for residential and commercial properties across Melbourne and Geelong.

06
🔥

Hot Water Systems

Supply, installation and servicing of all hot water systems. Gas, electric, and heat pump specialists for any property type.

About Us

Above. Beyond.
Every Time.

Deluxe Plumbing is an established plumbing company with over 15 years delivering industry-leading results across Melbourne and Greater Geelong. We work across insurance, preventative maintenance, domestic, and commercial plumbing — always to the highest standard.

Our team of experienced, licensed plumbers builds solid relationships with builders, property managers, insurance case managers, and homeowners who trust us to deliver.

Above. Beyond. — It's not just a tagline, it's how we work.
Fully licensed & insured plumbers
Insurance & case manager specialists
15+ years across Melbourne & Geelong
Commercial & domestic expertise
